title: AI Supercharges Sales & Unlocks Scientific Breakthroughs! #shorts
summary: A short-form video argues that AI is revolutionizing sales preparation and deal closing while accelerating scientific discovery. The content emphasizes AI's transformative potential across commercial and research domains.
writeup: This short from Cyril Imhof makes the case that AI is reshaping two domains at once: sales work and scientific research. On the commercial side, it points to AI improving sales preparation and helping close deals; on the research side, it frames AI as a driver that accelerates scientific discovery. The throughline is AI's broad transformative potential across both commercial and research settings.
